name: +1 Sword
description: Adds +1 to attack rolls and +1 to damage rolls.

name: +1 Hand Axe
description: Adds +1 to attack rolls and +1 to damage rolls.

name: +2 Battle Axe
description: Adds +2 to attack rolls and +2 to damage rolls.

name: +1 Dagger of Returning
description: Adds +1 to attack and damage; may return to the wielder if the Guide allows.

name: +1 Short Sword of Silent Striking
description: Adds +1 to attack and damage; suited to stealthy attacks.

name: +2 Hammer of the Old Halls
description: Adds +2 to attack and damage; carries old dwarven history.
